mapper.insert: INSERT INTO document_chunk (document_id, content, embedding, doc_type, symptom_tag, chunk_index, create_time) VALUES (#{chunk.documentId}, #{chunk.content}, #{embedding}::vector, #{chunk.docType}, #{chunk.symptomTag}, #{chunk.chunkIndex}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, document_id, content, doc_type, symptom_tag, chunk_index FROM document_chunk ORDER BY embedding <=> #{embedding}::vector LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT id, document_id, content, doc_type, symptom_tag, chunk_index FROM document_chunk WHERE content_tsv @@ plainto_tsquery('english', #{keyword}) ORDER BY ts_rank(content_tsv, plainto_tsquery('english', #{keyword})) DESC LIMIT #{limit}
